payloads.text:
Perfect. ✅ File exists.

Now run this exact repair block:

```powershell
$cfg = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".openclaw\openclaw.json"
Copy-Item $cfg "$cfg.bak-$(Get-Date -Format yyyyMMdd-HHmmss)"
$raw = Get-Content $cfg -Raw
$obj = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json
$obj | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 100 | Set-Content $cfg -Encoding UTF8
"JSON_REPAIR_OK"
```

If it errors, paste the full error text exactly.
If it prints `JSON_REPAIR_OK`, next we’ll run `openclaw status --deep`.
